title: Bridge Essay: The Temporality of Situated Cognition.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** 4E cognition — embodied, embedded, enactive, extended mind; critique of computationalism.

**The Temporality of Situated Cognition.**. Front Psychol.. PMID: 33132954. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2020.546212. Situated cognition embeds perceptions, thoughts, and behavior within the contextual framework of so-called "4E cognition" understanding cognition to be embodied, enactive, extended, and embedded. Whereas this definition is primarily based on the spatial properties of asituation, it neglects afundamental constituent: the cognitive situation as enduring.
